docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $199.50 FILED BY COHEN, ALLISON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
